title: AP E-Procurement Mandate — Works AND Material Procurement ≥ Rs.1 Lakh
text_english: All WORKS and MATERIAL PROCUREMENT (including works, stationery / livery supplies for offices, and other office consumables) costing Rs.{{eproc_works_threshold}} (default Rs.1,00,000 i.e. Rs.1 Lakh) AND ABOVE SHALL be invited through the e-procurement platform ONLY (apeprocurement.gov.in) — to enhance TRANSPARENCY and bring UNIFORMITY across all AP Government Departments. This GO supersedes earlier department-specific e-procurement thresholds previously fixed by T,R&B (works), MA&UD (works/material), and I&CAD (PW:Reforms) departments. (Source: GO Ms No 2, Finance (Works & Projects-F7) Department, dated 03-02-2014.)
